productDisplayName: Nike Men's As Repeat Grey T-shirt
description: Grey round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print and rubber print detailing on the front and back right hem line, and grey fabric tape on inseam of the neckline  Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colors Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Cool iron, but do not iron directly on print/embroidery Do not dry clean Look cool and laidback in this grey Athletic Department  t-shirt from nike. The graphic lettering of the brand name in multiple blocks on the front and the name near the back right hemline amplifies the brand image.
